name: Quick and Easy Dinner
recipeIngredient: 2 Bags of Frozen Stew Veggies (The Large Ones)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chuck roast in the Crock Pot.
2. Add 2 1/2 cups of water to the pot.
3. Arrange the Soup on top of the meat.
4. Layer the Stew Veggies on top of the soup.
5. Turn the Crock Pot to LOW if cooking for 8 or more hours, or HIGH if cooking for 6 or less hours.
6. When you get home, enjoy your ready-to-eat meal!
